ACCOUNTS.description: Bank accounts (card accounts). One row per account. Primary key: ACCOUNT_ID.

columns.ACCOUNT_ID: Internal numeric account identifier. Primary key.
columns.ACCOUNT_NO: IBAN (masked in DEV: BG...SOMB...). Do not display raw in production.

CARD_TRANSACTIONS.description: Card payment transactions. Primary table for card transaction analysis. NOTE (DEV): CARD_AMOUNT is mostly 0 in the DEV snapshot - use AMOUNT_LOCAL_CCY for monetary analysis.

columns.DESCRIPTION: Free-text transaction description (often in Bulgarian Cyrillic). Used for classification. ATM transactions start with 'АТМ'. Includes timestamp suffix - group by prefix for location analysis.
columns.CARD_AMOUNT: Transaction amount in the original card currency. CAUTION: equals 0 for most rows in the DEV snapshot. Only use when user explicitly asks for card-currency amount.
columns.AMOUNT_LOCAL_CCY: Transaction amount converted to local currency (BGN). Preferred column for monetary analysis - contains the real amount even when CARD_AMOUNT=0.
columns.TRANSACTION_DATE: Date and time when the transaction was executed (Oracle DATE). DEV data ends 2023-11-10 - queries for 'this week' or 'last month' against SYSDATE will return no rows.
columns.SETTLEMENT_DATE: Date when the transaction was settled by the bank. May differ from TRANSACTION_DATE.
columns.CARD_COMMUNITY: Payment scheme of the card used. 'EUR' = Mastercard (Europe MC includes the local BCARD-on-MC product), 'VIS' = Visa, 'AME' = American Express. BCARD is NOT a separate value in DEV.
columns.MERCHANT_IDN: External merchant identifier (VARCHAR2(10)). FK to MERCHANTS.MERCHANT_IDN. ~52% of rows have a merchant; the rest are ATM / system transactions (no merchant). Use INNER JOIN to MERCHANTS to exclude ATM rows automatically.
columns.INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE: Per-transaction interchange amount (acquirer<->issuer netting) in BGN. Signed: POSITIVE = received by bank, NEGATIVE = paid by bank. 78% of rows in DEV have a non-zero value. CRITICAL: this is the canonical Visa + Mastercard interchange source for this bank - the dedicated VISA_INT_254 / MC TT140 IRF tables are EMPTY in DEV because the bank has no Visa data-subscription. For interchange income/expense per scheme use this column, not the VSS/TT140 aggregate tables.
columns.CHARGE_AMOUNT_LOCAL: Per-transaction cardholder fee in local BGN currency. Income to the bank from the cardholder side. 25% of rows non-zero in DEV. Use for 'cardholder transaction fee income' aggregations.
columns.CHARGE_AMOUNT_POS_LOCAL: Per-transaction merchant (POS) fee in local BGN currency. Income to the bank from the merchant/acquiring side. 12% of rows non-zero in DEV. Use for 'merchant transaction fee income' aggregations.
columns.CHARGE_AMOUNT_CCY_CONV_LOCAL: Per-transaction currency-conversion fee (Piraeus FX fee) in local BGN currency. 2.4% of rows non-zero in DEV - only on cross-currency transactions. Use for FX-conversion fee income aggregations.
columns.CARD_COMMUNITY_NOTE: Source column comment lists VIS / EUR / BOR (Borica) / LOC (local bank with own SUK). DEV actually contains only EUR (78%), VIS (21%), AME (~0.01%, 923 rows); BOR and LOC are defined but absent from this snapshot. Treat 'AME' as a known DEV value when reporting.

foreign_keys.notes: VARCHAR on both sides; ~52% non-null - rest are ATM/system.
NULL until the financial transaction is matched against an earlier authorization.

CARD_AUTHORIZATIONS.description: Bank-issued card authorizations (issuer view). One row per authorization. Source of bank-side authorization processing latency: TIME_STAMP (record received) vs SEND_DATE (response sent toward BORICA). NOT the full POS-to-network round-trip - this is the internal pipeline. Populated 2023-01-03 onwards in DEV (~2.5M rows).

columns.CARD_NO: PAN of the authorized card. PII - never surface raw.
columns.RETRIEVAL_REF: ISO 8583 DE 037 retrieval reference number from the acquirer.
columns.ACCEPTOR_IDN: ISO 8583 DE 042 card acceptor (merchant) identification code.
columns.AUTHORIZATION_DATE: Original transaction date from the network message (DATE).
columns.AUTHORIZATION_CODE: Authorization identification response (DE 038) - the approval code returned.
columns.AUTHORIZATION_SUM: Transaction amount in the acquirer's currency (DE 004).
columns.AUTHORIZATION_TYPE: CHAR(1). '5' = On-Us (our card, domestic); '9' = Issuing (our card, foreign acquirer routed via BORICA).
columns.CARD_COMMUNITY: Scheme of the card. 'VIS' = Visa, 'EUR' = Mastercard (DE 011 card belonging).
columns.TIME_STAMP: TIMESTAMP(6). Exact moment the authorization record entered the database ('точно време на постъпване на записа в базата'). Use as the START of bank-side processing latency.
columns.SEND_DATE: TIMESTAMP(6). Moment the outbound message was sent toward BORICA ('дата на която е изпратено съобщението към BORIKA'). Use as the END of bank-side processing latency. NULL on ~0.0004% of rows.
columns.TRANSACTION_ID: FK to CARD_TRANSACTIONS - set after the authorization has been matched to a settlement / financial transaction.
columns.SEND_FILE_ID: Identifier of the BORICA outbound file the message was packaged in.

foreign_keys.notes: Populated only after authorization is matched to a financial / settlement row; NULL otherwise.

STG_TRANSACTIONS_BORICA_EO.description: Staging table for raw BORICA card-network messages (authorizations, settlements, declines, journal entries). Primary source for authorization-performance analysis and decline-reason breakdowns (UC-02). One row per file record - includes ISO 8583 fields with original BORICA positional indexes in brackets [NN] in column descriptions. Use TIME_STAMP (TIMESTAMP) for date filtering, NOT the VARCHAR2 TRANSACTION_DATE field.

columns.TRANSACTION_CODE: File-record type. 'A' = authorization approved, 'N' = authorization declined (decline reason in AUTH_RESPONCE_CODE), 'D' = settlement / financial transaction (clears an earlier 'A' - NOT an independent approval), 'B' = balance inquiry / journal. CRITICAL: for approval-rate analysis include ONLY 'A' and 'N' - adding 'D' double-counts approvals.
columns.AUTH_RESPONCE_CODE: ISO 8583 authorization response code. Populated on 'N' (declined) rows. Common codes: 51 = Insufficient funds, 57 = Transaction not permitted, 14 = Invalid card, 05 = Do not honor, 65 = Exceeds withdrawal limit, 55 = Incorrect PIN. Trim and bucket blanks as 'UNKNOWN' before reporting.
columns.POS_ENTRY_MODE: ISO 8583 point-of-service entry mode (4 chars). LIKE '07%' => contactless. Use as primary signal for channel classification.
columns.MERCHANT_TYPE: Merchant Category Code (MCC). '6011' = ATM cash withdrawal. Use AFTER POS_ENTRY_MODE check when classifying channel (Contactless / ATM / POS).
columns.TERMINAL_TYPE: BORICA-internal two-digit terminal type code. Complements MERCHANT_TYPE for channel breakdowns.
columns.TIME_STAMP: Timestamp when BORICA recorded the message (TIMESTAMP(6)). PREFERRED date column for filtering - the VARCHAR TRANSACTION_DATE/TRANSACTION_TIME fields require parsing.
columns.TRANSACTION_DATE: Original BORICA-file transaction date as VARCHAR2(8) 'YYYYMMDD'. Prefer TIME_STAMP for filtering.
columns.PRIMARY_ACCOUNT_NUMBER: PAN (card number) from BORICA file. PII - never surface raw.
columns.ACQUIRER_TRANSACTION_AMOUNT: Transaction amount in the acquirer's currency. Use with ACQUIRER_CURRENCY_CODE.
columns.CARD_TRANSACTION_AMOUNT: Transaction amount in the card's currency. Use with CARD_CURRENCY_CODE.
columns.CARD_ACCEPTOR_NAME: Merchant name from the file. May be uppercased / abbreviated.
columns.CARD_ACCEPTOR_LOCATION: Merchant location string from the file.

CARDS.description: Issued cards. One row per card. Primary key: CARD_ID (not shown in shortlist below). Used for portfolio metrics (active, new, closed, churn).

columns.STATUS: Card lifecycle status. CHAR(1). '0' = transient / not yet produced, '1' = in production, '2' = active (issued, usable - the 'live' state), '3' = closed / canceled. NOTE: codes are digit strings, not 'A'/'N'.
columns.STATUS_DATE: Date of the last status change. For closed cards (STATUS='3') this is the close date - filter on this for 'closed in period' queries.
columns.PREVIOUS_STATUS: Status value before the most recent change.
columns.PREVIOUS_STATUS_DATE: Date of the previous status change.
columns.OPEN_DATE: Date the card was opened / issued. Use for 'new cards in period' queries.
columns.PRODUCT_ID: FK to CARD_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID. Resolves to product name via JOIN.
columns.OFFICE_OWNER_ID: FK to OFFICES.OFFICE_ID - the issuing office that owns the card. Use for regional / branch distribution of the active portfolio.
columns.OFFICE_REQUEST_ID: FK to OFFICES.OFFICE_ID - office where the card was requested (may differ from owner).
columns.OFFICE_RECEIVING_ID: FK to OFFICES.OFFICE_ID - office where the card was delivered.
columns.REASON_CLOSE_ID: FK to CARD_REASON_CLOSE.CLOSE_REASON_ID (VARCHAR2). ~50% of closed cards in DEV have NULL here - bucket as '(none specified)' on display.
columns.REASON_BLOCK_UNBLOCK_ID: FK to the reason taxonomy for block/unblock events (when applicable).

foreign_keys.notes: Issuing office that owns the card; prefer this for branch-distribution metrics.
Office where the card was requested.
Office where the card was delivered.
VARCHAR2(2) on both sides. ~50% of closed cards (STATUS='3') in DEV have NULL here.

CARD_PRODUCTS.description: Card products catalog (table description in source: 'Картови продукти'). One row per product. Joined from CARDS via PRODUCT_ID for product-name resolution.

columns.PRODUCT_ID: Surrogate primary key (NUMBER). Joined to CARDS.PRODUCT_ID.
columns.NAME: Product display name (e.g. 'MasterCard Debit PayPass - Consumer', 'Bcard local - Consumer'). Use this in GROUP BY for portfolio reports.
columns.BIN: Bank Identification Number (6 chars) - the leading BIN of card numbers issued under this product.
columns.IS_PAYROLL: 'Y' = payroll product (cards issued via employer scheme).
columns.IS_ACTIVE: 'Y' = new cards can still be issued under this product.

MERCHANTS.description: Bank merchants (acceptors) - merchant master with one row per merchant terminal/contract. Joined from CARD_TRANSACTIONS via MERCHANT_IDN. Source description: 'Таблица с търговци клиенти на банката, които имат инсталирани устройства при тях'.

columns.MERCHANT_IDN: External merchant identifier (VARCHAR2(10)) - the FK actually used to join from CARD_TRANSACTIONS.MERCHANT_IDN. Both sides are strings; do not cast to numeric.
columns.NAME: Merchant display name (VARCHAR2(50)).
columns.MC_ID: FK to MERCHANT_CATEGORIES (merchant category / MCC group).
columns.ACCEPT_CARD_COMMUNITY: Which scheme cards this merchant accepts. 'VIS' = Visa + local; 'EUR' = Mastercard + local; 'E_V' = all; 'LOC' = local only.
columns.CURRENCY_CODE: ISO numeric currency the merchant settles in.
columns.IS_ACTIVE: Logical delete flag. 'Y' = active row; 'N' = soft-deleted.
columns.OFFICE_ID: FK to OFFICES - the bank office that signed up this merchant.

foreign_keys.notes: Bank office that signed up the merchant.
Target table (MERCHANT_CATEGORIES) is not yet in this descriptions file.

MC_IRF_ACQUIRING_TT140.description: Mastercard TT140 acquiring interchange reconciliation aggregates. One row per acquired-volume bucket per settlement day. In DEV all 5308 rows carry DESCRIPTION='FIRST PRES. TOTAL' (first-presentment totals); split is by currency + CR/DR direction. CCY is ISO numeric: 978=EUR, 840=USD (no BGN aggregates in DEV). Used by UC-03 Mastercard interchange summaries.

columns.DESCRIPTION: Bucket type / report-row label from the TT140 file (VARCHAR2(200)). DEV contains only 'FIRST PRES. TOTAL'.
columns.COUNTS: Number of presentments in the bucket.
columns.RECONT_AMOUNT: Reconciliation amount in CCY for the bucket (gross presentment volume).
columns.D_C_INDICATOR: Credit / debit direction of RECONT_AMOUNT. 'CR' = credit to acquirer, 'DR' = debit to acquirer (chargebacks / fees).
columns.CCY: ISO numeric currency for RECONT_AMOUNT. 978 = EUR, 840 = USD (DEV: no BGN).
columns.FEE: Interchange fee amount in FEE_CCY for the bucket.
columns.FEE_D_C_INDICATOR: Credit / debit direction of FEE. 'CR' = fee paid TO bank, 'DR' = fee paid BY bank.
columns.FEE_CCY: ISO numeric currency of FEE (DEV: always matches CCY).
columns.SETTLEMENT_DATE: Mastercard settlement date as VARCHAR2(6) 'YYMMDD' (e.g. '231109' = 2023-11-09). When filtering by a calendar window convert with TO_DATE(SETTLEMENT_DATE,'YYMMDD') or compare as strings 'YYMMDD'.
columns.FROM_FILE_ID: Identifier of the incoming TT140 file.
columns.SEND_FILE_ID: Identifier of the outbound file used to forward the data downstream (CORE).

BORICA_SETTLEMENT.description: Daily BORICA card-network settlement aggregates (BG-language source comments). One row per file batch per settlement day - DEV has 432 rows from 2023, FILE_TYPE always 'NO', IS_PROCESSES='Y', no error rows. Used by UC-04 BORICA daily net-position reports.

columns.SETTLEMENT_DATE: BORICA settlement date (Oracle DATE). Use directly with TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') range filters.
columns.DT_COUNT: Брой ДЕБИТ транзакции - number of debit-side transactions in the file batch.
columns.DT_SUM: Обща сума на ДЕБИТ транзакциите (NUMBER(12,2)) - total debit amount in BGN.
columns.DT_TAX: Междубанкови такси ДЕБИТ - interbank fees on the debit side.
columns.CT_COUNT: Брой КРЕДИТ транзакции - number of credit-side transactions in the file batch.
columns.CT_SUM: Обща сума на КРЕДИТ транзакциите (NUMBER(12,2)) - total credit amount in BGN. Net position per day = SUM(CT_SUM) - SUM(DT_SUM).
columns.CT_TAX: Междубанкови такси КРЕДИТ - interbank fees on the credit side.
columns.FROM_FILE_ID: Идентификатор на файла с който е постъпил записа.
columns.IS_PROCESSES: Дали е подаден към CORE: 'Y'=обработен, 'N'=необработен. DEV: always 'Y'.
columns.SEQ_NO_UPL: Пореден номер на опит за upload към Core.
columns.CORE_REF_NO: Идентификатор на транзакцията в CORE SYSTEM.
columns.ERR_CODE: Код на грешка при upload (NULL when OK). Filter `ERR_CODE IS NOT NULL` for failed rows.
columns.ERR_MESS: Текст на грешка при upload (NULL when OK).

VISA_SETTLEMENT.description: Daily Visa settlement aggregates parsed from VSS reports. One row per (REPORT_TYPE, SUMMARY_TYPE, CCY, REGION, INDICATOR) bucket per settlement day - DEV ~64K rows for 2023. Used by UC-04 Visa settlement summaries.

columns.REPORT_TYPE: Visa VSS report identifier (VARCHAR2(5)). DEV values: 'V4130' (55716 rows, interchange detail), 'V4140' (5772, charges summary), 'V4120' (2526, summary by clearing currency).
columns.SUMMARY_TYPE: Visa VSS summary-type code (VARCHAR2(2)). DEV: '10' for V4130/V4120, '09' for V4140.
columns.REQION: Visa region code (VARCHAR2(4)) - column name is misspelled in source ('REQION', NOT 'REGION'). Quote carefully.
columns.CNT: Number of transactions in the bucket.
columns.AMT_SETTLEMENT_INDICATOR: Credit/debit direction (VARCHAR2(2)). 'CR' (55126 rows) = credit to bank, 'DB' (1356) = debit from bank, '  ' two-space blank (7532) = neutral / informational subtotal. Trim before grouping.
columns.DT_AMT_CHARGE: Debit side of charge / fee amount.
columns.CT_AMT_CHARGE: Credit side of charge / fee amount.
columns.FROM_FILE_ID: Identifier of the incoming VSS file.
columns.SETTLEMENT_DATE: Visa settlement date as VARCHAR2(8) 'YYYYMMDD' (e.g. '20231110'). Convert with TO_DATE(SETTLEMENT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') for range filtering.
columns.IS_REVERSAL: 'Y' = reversal row, 'N' = forward presentment. ~0.6% of DEV rows are reversals.
columns.DIRECTION: Settlement direction (CHAR(1)). '1' = acquiring, '2' = issuing, '3' = other. DEV: 63992 rows are acquiring ('1'), 22 are 'other' ('3'); no issuing rows in DEV.

REPORT_FILES_PROCESSED_V.description: View over the card-network file processing journal. One row per (file, processing attempt) - DEV has 17425 rows, ~99.7% successful. Used by UC-04 file-processing status reports.

columns.FILE_NAME: Original file name (VARCHAR2(3978)) - includes the file-type prefix (TT140, TTN70, BI, TI, EO, MO, MI, TO, UO-*).
columns.PROCESS_DATE: Date the file was processed (Oracle DATE). Preferred filter column.
columns.STATUS: Bulgarian-text status. 'Обработен' (17367) = processed OK, 'Грешка при обработка' (58) = processing error. Compare against the literal Bulgarian strings, NOT 'OK'/'ERROR'.
columns.ERROR_MSG: Error detail (VARCHAR2(4000)) - populated only when STATUS='Грешка при обработка'.
columns.DIRECTION: Direction of the file (CHAR(1)). 'I' = incoming (11225 rows, files received from BORICA / Mastercard / Visa), 'O' = outgoing (6200, files sent towards the network).
columns.PROCESS_NAME: Bulgarian description of the file-type pipeline that handled the file (e.g. 'TT140_Обработка на файл от MASTERCARD', 'EO- Обработка на ЕО файл от Борика', 'TI- Извеждане на TI файл към БОРИКА').

OFFICES.description: Bank branch / sales-point dictionary. One row per office (DEV: 185, all active). Joined from CARDS (OFFICE_OWNER_ID / OFFICE_REQUEST_ID / OFFICE_RECEIVING_ID) and MERCHANTS (OFFICE_ID) on OFFICES.OFFICE_ID. Used by UC-05 portfolio-by-branch breakdowns.

columns.OFFICE_ID: Идентификатор на офиса (точка на продажба), сурогатен ключ (NUMBER, S_OFFICE sequence). Primary key - join target from CARDS / MERCHANTS.
columns.OFFICE_NO: Идентификатор на офиса за пред основната банкова система (VARCHAR2(8)).
columns.BRANCH_CODE: Идентификатор на офиса за пред външния свят - номер на банковия клон (VARCHAR2(8)).
columns.EMBOSSMENT_BRANCH_CODE: Номер под който банковият клон е регистриран при изработващата пластиката организация (VARCHAR2(2)).
columns.NAME: Наименование на офиса - use this for human-readable groupings.
columns.IS_ACTIVE: Активен ли е офисът. 'Y' = могат да се откриват клиенти/сметки/карти; 'N' = не могат. DEV: all 185 rows are 'Y'.
columns.IS_DEFAULT: 'Y' = офис по подразбиране при откриване на карти.
columns.ADDRESS: Адрес (custom Oracle ADDRESS object type - do NOT SELECT it directly in cross-DB code).

CHARGE_EVENTS.description: Realized non-transaction card-fee events (BG source: 'Таблица съдържаща събития за таксуване, сума, на таксата, код валута'). One row per chargeable event on a card or account (monthly fees, ATM balance inquiries, new-card issuance, reissuance, close-card, PIN-change fees, etc.). 1.4M rows in DEV; ~93% in STATUS='3' (posted to GL). Used by UC-03 for fee-income aggregation - NOT REPORT_CARD_*_FEE_V views, which only describe tariff configuration.

columns.CARD_ID: FK to CARDS. NULL when the fee is at account level (not tied to a specific card). DEV: ~99% are card-level, ~1% account-level.
columns.EVENT_IDN: Event-type code (VARCHAR2(30)). FK to CHARGE_EVENT_TYPES. Common DEV values: MONTHLY_FEE_CARD (820K, top by volume), BALANSATM (467K, ATM balance inquiry), NOT_APPROVED_AUTH (32K), NEW_CARD, REISSUECARD, CHANGE_PIN_ATM, CLOSE_CARD, MGR_FEE_CARD, CARD_NOT_RECEIVED, MONTHLY_FEE_CARD_ADD, CHACK_LAST_5_TRN, NORMALIZATION, FEE_OVERDUE_ONCE, REISSUE_LOST_CARD, NEW_3D_PASS.
columns.STATUS: Event lifecycle (CHAR(1)). '0' = arrived (raw), '1' = fee computed (amount populated), '2' = submitted for accounting, '3' = posted to GL (realized income), '4' = submitted for auto-collection by FC. **For realized fee income use STATUS='3'.** STATUS='0' rows have NULL CHARGE_AMOUNT / CHARGE_CURRENCY.
columns.TIME_STAMP: Time the event record was created (TIMESTAMP(6)). Earliest in DEV: 2022-12-31. Use TIME_ACCOUNTING for 'income posted' filtering, not this.
columns.CHARGE_AMOUNT: Fee amount in account currency (NUMBER(15,2)). Populated when STATUS >= 1.
columns.CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHAR_CODE: ISO 3-letter currency code of CHARGE_AMOUNT (in account currency). DEV: ~96% 'BGN', ~0.5% 'EUR', ~4% NULL (STATUS='0' rows).
columns.TIME_ACCOUNTING: Timestamp when STATUS moved 1 -> 2 (fee sent for accounting). **PREFERRED filter for fee-income 'as of period' queries**: STATUS='3' rows are guaranteed to have TIME_ACCOUNTING populated. DEV range: 2023-01-03 .. 2023-11-10.
columns.TIME_GET_CORE_REF: Timestamp when STATUS moved 2 -> 3 (CORE reference received from main banking system).
columns.CORE_REF_NO: Accounting reference in the CORE banking system (VARCHAR2(100)). Populated when STATUS = '3'.
columns.MESS_ERR_COMPUTING: Error message from the compute step (NULL when OK).
columns.MESS_ERR_ACCOUNTING: Error message from the accounting step (NULL when OK).
columns.SEND_FILE_ID: Outbound file ID if accounting is file-based.
columns.REGULAR_EVENT_DATE: Date the event is generated for (used for periodic / monthly fee runs).
columns.IS_REGISTER_DUTY: 'Y' = duty registered in credit module (credit cards only).
columns.LAST_USER: User / system that captured the fee.
columns.SOURCE_ID: Origin transaction_id when the fee was triggered by a financial message in CARD_TRANSACTIONS (e.g. PIN-change, balance inquiry).
columns.CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHARGE: ISO 3-letter currency code in which the fee was defined in the tariff (may differ from CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHAR_CODE if the tariff is set in EUR but charged in BGN).
columns.CHARGE_AMOUNT_CHARGE: Fee amount in the tariff currency (NUMBER(15,2)). The 'gross' fee before being converted to account currency.

foreign_keys.notes: NULL when the fee is at account level (not card-specific). DEV: ~99% card-level, ~1% account-level.
Target table (CHARGE_EVENT_TYPES) is not yet in this descriptions file.
Conditional: populated only when the fee was triggered by a financial message (PIN change, balance check, etc.).

MERCHANT_CHARGE_EVENTS.description: Realized non-transaction device/merchant-fee events (BG source: 'Таблица съдържаща събития за таксуване, сума, на таксата, код валута'). One row per chargeable event on a device or merchant (monthly device fees, etc.). 2.5K rows in DEV - much smaller than CHARGE_EVENTS; only DEVICE_MONTH_FEE present, all device-level. Used by UC-03 for device-side fee-income aggregation.

columns.ACCOUNT_NO: Account number (FK to ACCOUNTS) the fee posts to.
columns.DEVICE_ID: FK to DEVICE. NULL when the fee is at merchant level (not tied to a specific device). DEV: all device-level.
columns.MERCHANT_ID: FK to MERCHANTS. Populated for merchant-level fees.
columns.STATUS: Event lifecycle (CHAR(1)). Same semantics as CHARGE_EVENTS.STATUS: '0'/'1'/'2'/'3'. **Use STATUS='3' for realized device-fee income.** DEV: 2254 STATUS='3', 241 STATUS='2'.
columns.TIME_STAMP: Time the event record was created (TIMESTAMP(6)).
columns.CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHAR_CODE: ISO 3-letter currency code of CHARGE_AMOUNT. DEV: 'BGN' only.
columns.TIME_ACCOUNTING: Timestamp when STATUS moved 1 -> 2. **PREFERRED filter for device-fee 'as of period' queries.** DEV range: 2023-01-10 .. 2023-11-06.
columns.CORE_REF_NO: Accounting reference in CORE banking system.
columns.REGULAR_EVENT_DATE: Date the event is generated for.
columns.LAST_USER: User / system that captured the fee.
columns.CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHARGE: ISO 3-letter currency code in which the fee was defined in the tariff.
columns.CHARGE_AMOUNT_CHARGE: Fee amount in the tariff currency.
columns.SOURCE_ID: Origin transaction_id when triggered by a financial message.

foreign_keys.notes: Surrogate numeric key, NOT the VARCHAR MERCHANT_IDN used by CARD_TRANSACTIONS.
NULL when the fee is merchant-level. DEV: all device-level. Target table (DEVICE) is not yet in this descriptions file.
Target table (CHARGE_EVENT_TYPES) is not yet in this descriptions file.
Conditional: populated only when the fee was triggered by a financial message.

CARD_REASON_CLOSE.description: Card-closure reason taxonomy (BG). Two-column lookup: CLOSE_REASON_ID (VARCHAR2(2)) -> REASON_TEXT (Bulgarian). Joined from CARDS.REASON_CLOSE_ID. Note: ~50% of closed cards in DEV have NULL REASON_CLOSE_ID - bucket as '(none specified)' on display.

columns.CLOSE_REASON_ID: Идентификатор на причината - първичен ключ (VARCHAR2(2)). Single-character codes plus digit codes. Known DEV values: '0'=Задържана карта от АТМ, '3'=Предсрочно закриване, '8'=Компрометирана карта, '9'=Изгубена/Открадната карта, 'D'=Починал клиент, 'E'=Изтичане срок на валидност, 'F'=Сменено име, 'G'=Сгрешено име, 'H'=Отказ от карта/90 дни, 'J'=Забравен ПИН код, 'M'=Служебно-Дефектирала карта, 'P'=Разменен ПИН код, 'U'=По вина на клиента, 'X'=Разменени карти, 'Y'=Служебно-компрометирана карта.
